title: Duplicate swtpm env-var init logic will diverge
description: wolftpm::Device::open_swtpm (device.rs) and wolftpm_tss::WolfTpmSwtpm::connect (connection.rs) contain near-identical setenv/init/unsetenv sequences with a comment saying 'Any bug fix to this function must also be applied there.' Manual sync of two copies across two crates will fail — the copies will diverge when the next bug is fixed in one and forgotten in the other. The fix is to extract the setenv/init/unsetenv sequence into a shared function in wolftpm-sys (which both depend on), or to have wolftpm-tss delegate to wolftpm's Device.
